basic_details.post_name: Individual Consultant (HR/ Coord.) at Level- III
basic_details.short_information: Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (PNGRB) Individual Consultant (HR/ Coord.) at Level- III Notification 2026 has been released on 19 June 2026 on the official website of PNGRB. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PNGRB Individual Consultant (HR/ Coord.) at Level- III Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation from Govt. recognised University. Desirable: LLB/PG Diploma in HRM
qualification.details: Graduation from a Government recognized University. Desirable: LLB or PG Diploma in HRM.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Individual Consultant (HR/ Coord.) at Level- III

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Individual Consultant (HR/ Coord.) at Level- III

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the PNGRB Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: PNGRB Individual Consultant (HR/ Coord.) at Level- III Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PNGRB Individual Consultant (HR/ Coord.) at Level- III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PNGRB Individual Consultant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the PNGRB Individual Consultant (HR/ Coord.) at Level- III post is 02-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduation degree from a Government recognized University. A LLB or PG Diploma in HRM is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Individual Consultant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 62 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Individual Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Individual Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Individual Consultant (HR/ Coord.) at Level- III post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications by post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the PNGRB Individual Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of PNGRB.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is PNGRB/Admin/12 – HR(22)/2025.
